CustomField.description: Marks this Tribal Consultation engagement event as formally certified by the responsible agency official. Required to clear the VR-005 tribal stage gate on the parent IndividualApplication before advancing to Final EIS Preparation or Record of Decision.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check when the agency official has formally certified that government-to-government tribal consultation requirements are met for this process. Required before advancing to Final EIS or ROD.
CustomField.label: Consultation Certified
